---
title: "API reference"
toc: true
---

Per-module API documentation, organised by import path: signatures, named
tensor dimensions (shapes + glossary), and — where the sibling
`nitrix-perf-bench` has measured a kernel — a benchmark headline and table.
Each module links to its own page, which in turn lists one page per public
symbol.

::: {.callout-important title="Work in progress"}
These pages are **auto-generated** by `gen_reference_stubs.py` (static, from
source `__all__` + jaxtyping annotations + perf-bench reports). Signatures,
shapes, and benchmark figures are real; the per-parameter and overview **prose is
still being filled**, and coverage is expanding beyond `nitrix.stats`. Not for
final publication as-is (SPEC §6.5).
:::

## Modules

<!-- nitrix:gen index-tree -->
## `nitrix`

- [`geometry`](nitrix-geometry.qmd) — Geometric primitives for neuroimaging.
- [`graph`](nitrix-graph.qmd) — Graph-theoretic primitives.
- [`linalg`](nitrix-linalg.qmd) — nitrix.linalg -- linear-algebra primitives.
- [`morphology`](nitrix-morphology.qmd) — Mathematical morphology built atop the semiring substrate.
- [`register`](nitrix-register.qmd) — nitrix.register -- pairwise registration recipes.
- [`semiring`](nitrix-semiring.qmd) — KeOps-style streaming reductions over arbitrary algebras.
- [`signal`](nitrix-signal.qmd) — nitrix.signal -- 1D signal-processing primitives.
- [`smoothing`](nitrix-smoothing.qmd) — Edge-preserving and non-edge-preserving smoothing.
- [`sparse`](nitrix-sparse.qmd) — nitrix.sparse -- geometry-aware sparse formats.
- [`stats`](nitrix-stats.qmd) — Mass-univariate statistical modelling for neuroimaging.

### `nitrix.geometry`

- [`affine`](nitrix-geometry-affine.qmd) — Geometric-parameter affine algebra (batched, differentiable).
- [`algebra`](nitrix-geometry-algebra.qmd) — Transform algebra: Lie-group barycentre, geodesic interpolation, fusion.
- [`coords`](nitrix-geometry-coords.qmd) — Coordinate utilities.
- [`deformation`](nitrix-geometry-deformation.qmd) — Deformation- and velocity-field algebra.
- [`differential`](nitrix-geometry-differential.qmd) — Image spatial-gradient operators.
- [`grid`](nitrix-geometry-grid.qmd) — Regular-grid deformable-registration primitives.
- [`intersection`](nitrix-geometry-intersection.qmd) — Triangle-mesh self-intersection detection and removal.
- [`isosurface`](nitrix-geometry-isosurface.qmd) — Volume <-> surface conversion.
- [`pyramid`](nitrix-geometry-pyramid.qmd) — Multi-resolution Gaussian pyramid.
- [`sphere`](nitrix-geometry-sphere.qmd) — 2-sphere primitives.
- [`sphere_grid`](nitrix-geometry-sphere_grid.qmd) — Parameterised-sphere (regular-grid) topology helpers.
- [`surface`](nitrix-geometry-surface.qmd) — Surface algorithms on triangle meshes.
- [`topology`](nitrix-geometry-topology.qmd) — Mesh topology invariants -- the genus-0 defect gate.
- [`transform`](nitrix-geometry-transform.qmd) — Lie-group parametrisation of rigid and affine transforms.

### `nitrix.graph`

- [`community`](nitrix-graph-community.qmd) — Community-detection primitives.
- [`connectopy`](nitrix-graph-connectopy.qmd) — Low-dimensional embeddings of graph nodes from spectral decompositions of (modified) Laplacians.
- [`laplacian`](nitrix-graph-laplacian.qmd) — Graph Laplacian variants and the shared sparse-matvec machinery.
- [`parcellation`](nitrix-graph-parcellation.qmd) — Surface functional parcellation: boundary mapping and watershed.

### `nitrix.linalg`

- [`decompose`](nitrix-linalg-decompose.qmd) — Randomized (sketch) low-rank SVD.
- [`kernel`](nitrix-linalg-kernel.qmd) — Pairwise kernel and distance functions.
- [`krylov`](nitrix-linalg-krylov.qmd) — Matrix-free Krylov solvers.
- [`matrix`](nitrix-linalg-matrix.qmd) — Matrix utilities for symmetric matrices, diagonals, and Toeplitz structure.
- [`matrix_function`](nitrix-linalg-matrix_function.qmd) — Matrix functions of a *general* (non-symmetric) matrix.
- [`optimize`](nitrix-linalg-optimize.qmd) — Small-residual nonlinear least squares: Gauss-Newton & Levenberg-Marquardt.
- [`residual`](nitrix-linalg-residual.qmd) — Residualisation via linear least squares.
- [`solve`](nitrix-linalg-solve.qmd) — Dense linear solves: general and SPD-Cholesky.
- [`spd`](nitrix-linalg-spd.qmd) — Symmetric positive-definite manifold operations.

### `nitrix.morphology`

- [`pooling`](nitrix-morphology-pooling.qmd) — Encoder-decoder pooling primitives with index-bookkeeping.

### `nitrix.numerics`

- [`fixed_point`](nitrix-numerics-fixed_point.qmd) — Fixed-point solver with implicit differentiation.
- [`normalize`](nitrix-numerics-normalize.qmd) — Per-tensor / per-channel intensity normalisation.
- [`ode`](nitrix-numerics-ode.qmd) — Fixed-step ODE integrators.
- [`spatial`](nitrix-numerics-spatial.qmd) — Volumetric shape and windowing utilities.
- [`tensor_ops`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd) — Tensor shape and layout utilities.

### `nitrix.register`

- [`diffeomorphic`](nitrix-register-diffeomorphic.qmd) — Diffeomorphic registration recipe: log-domain Demons.
- [`recipes`](nitrix-register-recipes.qmd) — Pairwise rigid / affine registration recipes.
- [`regulariser`](nitrix-register-regulariser.qmd) — Explicit penalties on a displacement / velocity field.

### `nitrix.semiring`

- [`algebras`](nitrix-semiring-algebras.qmd) — Built-in algebras shipped with `nitrix.semiring`.
- [`conv`](nitrix-semiring-conv.qmd) — Public [`semiring_conv`](nitrix-semiring-conv/semiring_conv.qmd) -- the convolution member of the semiring reduction family alongside [`semiring_matmul`](nitrix-semiring.qmd).
- [`ell`](nitrix-semiring-ell.qmd) — Semiring-generalised ELL-sparse matrix multiplication.
- [`ell_edge`](nitrix-semiring-ell_edge.qmd) — Edge-functional aggregation over ELL adjacencies.
- [`matmul`](nitrix-semiring-matmul.qmd) — Public [`semiring_matmul`](nitrix-semiring-matmul/semiring_matmul.qmd) with three-level backend selection.

### `nitrix.signal`

- [`filter`](nitrix-signal-filter.qmd) — Linear filtering: polynomial detrend and frequency-domain band-pass.
- [`fourier`](nitrix-signal-fourier.qmd) — Spectral / analytic-signal utilities.
- [`interpolate`](nitrix-signal-interpolate.qmd) — Linear interpolation of masked time series.
- [`lomb_scargle`](nitrix-signal-lomb_scargle.qmd) — Lomb-Scargle spectral methods for irregularly-sampled time series.
- [`tsconv`](nitrix-signal-tsconv.qmd) — 1-D time-series convolution along the trailing axis.
- [`window`](nitrix-signal-window.qmd) — Windowed-sample extraction.

### `nitrix.smoothing`

- [`bilateral`](nitrix-smoothing-bilateral.qmd) — Bounded bilateral smoothing via the semiring substrate.
- [`gaussian`](nitrix-smoothing-gaussian.qmd) — Separable n-D Gaussian filter.
- [`metric`](nitrix-smoothing-metric.qmd) — Feature-space metrics for the bounded bilateral filter.
- [`susan`](nitrix-smoothing-susan.qmd) — SUSAN-style edge-preserving smoothing.

### `nitrix.sparse`

- [`ell`](nitrix-sparse-ell.qmd) — ELL sparse format primitives.
- [`ell_sectioned`](nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned.qmd) — Sectioned ELL -- bucketed-row format for variable-degree adjacencies.
- [`grid`](nitrix-sparse-grid.qmd) — Regular-grid stencil specialisation of the ELL sparse format.
- [`mesh`](nitrix-sparse-mesh.qmd) — Triangle-mesh sparse adjacency constructors.

### `nitrix.stats`

- [`basis`](nitrix-stats-basis.qmd) — Penalised spline bases for additive models.
- [`betareg`](nitrix-stats-betareg.qmd) — Beta regression for proportions in $(0, 1)$.
- [`connectivity`](nitrix-stats-connectivity.qmd) — Regularised covariance and sparse-precision estimators for connectivity.
- [`covariance`](nitrix-stats-covariance.qmd) — Empirical covariance / correlation / partial / conditional measures.
- [`gam`](nitrix-stats-gam.qmd) — Mass-univariate generalised additive (mixed) models.
- [`gaulss`](nitrix-stats-gaulss.qmd) — Gaussian location-scale regression (`gaulss`).
- [`gaussian`](nitrix-stats-gaussian.qmd) — Closed-form diagonal-Gaussian quantities.
- [`glm`](nitrix-stats-glm.qmd) — Mass-univariate generalised linear models.
- [`glmm`](nitrix-stats-glmm.qmd) — Mass-univariate generalised **linear mixed** models (GLMM) via PQL.
- [`gp`](nitrix-stats-gp.qmd) — Mass-univariate Gaussian-process regression with lengthscale estimation.
- [`hgp`](nitrix-stats-hgp.qmd) — Mass-univariate **hierarchical** Gaussian-process regression (multi-level GP).
- [`inference`](nitrix-stats-inference.qmd) — nitrix.stats.inference -- permutation / cluster inference.
- [`lme`](nitrix-stats-lme.qmd) — Voxelwise linear mixed-effects models.
- [`ordinal`](nitrix-stats-ordinal.qmd) — Ordinal regression -- the cumulative-link (proportional-odds) model.
- [`pca`](nitrix-stats-pca.qmd) — Principal-component analysis.
- [`priors`](nitrix-stats-priors.qmd) — Lengthscale priors as REML regularisers (the `map_rho=` penalties).

#### `nitrix.stats.inference`

- [`cluster`](nitrix-stats-inference-cluster.qmd) — Cluster maps for threshold-based enhancement and inference.
- [`multiple_comparisons`](nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons.qmd) — Multiple-comparison corrections and multi-contrast combination for mass-univariate p-value and statistic maps.
- [`permutation`](nitrix-stats-inference-permutation.qmd) — Exchangeability operators for permutation inference.
- [`randomise`](nitrix-stats-inference-randomise.qmd) — Permutation inference for the general linear model.
- [`tfce`](nitrix-stats-inference-tfce.qmd) — Threshold-free cluster enhancement.

#### `nitrix.stats.lme`

- [`flame`](nitrix-stats-lme-flame.qmd) — FLAME-style two-level mixed-effects model for fMRI group analysis.
- [`reml`](nitrix-stats-lme-reml.qmd) — Variance-components REML for voxelwise linear mixed-effects models.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
